title: podman system df- show podman disk usage
body:
implement `podman system df` command showing podman disk usage
```
$ bin/podman system df
TYPE            TOTAL   ACTIVE   SIZE    RECLAIMABLE
Images          6       2        281MB   168MB (59%)
Containers      3       1        0B      0B (0%)
Local Volumes   1       1        22B     0B (0%)
```

Signed-off-by: Qi Wang <qiwan@redhat.com>

comments.body:
Missing Man Page
Needs changes to commands.md and transfer.md
In another PR we need to add varlink support as well as support for --format and --verbose.
@rhatdan PTAL. fixed your comments. But fails the tests
Can we get this PR in :thinking: ?

One small doc nit.  The changes LGTM, but I'd like @mheon to weigh in before merging as he'd a question on performance and about moving a function to libpod.  FWIW, I think it should move, but I'd be OK with an after merge move there.

Add implementation of --verbose and --format in this patch

```
$ podman system df -v
Images space usage:

REPOSITORY                 TAG      IMAGE ID       CREATED       SIZE     SHARED SIZE   UNQUE SIZE   CONTAINERS
docker.io/library/alpine   latest   5cb3aa00f899   2 weeks ago   5.79MB   0B            5.79MB       5

Containers space usage:

CONTAINER ID    IMAGE   COMMAND       LOCAL VOLUMES   SIZE     CREATED            STATUS       NAMES
073f7e62812d    5cb3    sleep 100     1               0B       About an hourago   exited       zen_joliot
3f19f5bba242    5cb3    sleep 100     0               5.52kB   4 hoursago         exited       pedantic_archimedes
8cd89bf645cc    5cb3    ls foodir     0               58B      2 hoursago         configured   agitated_hamilton
a1d948a4b61d    5cb3    ls foodir     0               12B      2 hoursago         exited       laughing_wing
eafe3e3c5bb3    5cb3    sleep 10000   0               72B      2 hoursago         running      priceless_liskov

Local Volumes space usage:

VOLUME NAME   LINKS   SIZE
data          1       0B

$ podman system df --format "{{.Type}}\t{{.Total}}"
Images          1
Containers      5
Local Volumes   1
```
LGTM. There is a typo in the output (i.e., `hoursago`) which predates this PR, so we might fix that in a separate PR.
